body_txt: A character exclaims, "Oh, God !" Or "Jesus Christ!" or some other variation. Another character reacts as if they have been addressed. Can be used by heroes or villains, and is usually an indicator of great power , great insanity , or both ; otherwise, it's Played for Laughs , especially if the person's name actually is "God." Originally named after the dialogue exchange quoted above, when Smith starts copying himself over Bane. If a Card-Carrying Villain , he will wryly comment that he's quite the opposite. For that, see Devil Complex . Compare A God Am I and Blasphemous Boast . Sister Trope to Blasphemous Praise , which doesn't require a response. See also Oh, My Gods! , if alternate deities are invoked. Not to be confused with Answer to Prayers , which is when the actual God responds.
